who: restaurant franchise owners processing 5–15 menu items/month

problem: Inaccurate nutritional information leading to compliance issues.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant franchise owners

Provide early-access onboarding for initial users

automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving of common inputs as templates
